character.definition: the birds singing during the night; (Cant.) interjection to indicate the speaker is thinking
(same as 醓) brine from pickled meat; condiments, juicy meat pulp; mashed meat cooked with soybean sauce, short and ugly, light of the setting moon; (Cant.) 肚䏙 stomach
cruciferous flowers; with acrid seeds; used as medicine
water in which rice has been boiled
